ogTitle: Voyager Point vs Wadalba: Climate Safety

heading: Voyager Point vs Wadalba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Voyager Point, New South Wales and Wadalba, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wadalba has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Voyager Point (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Voyager Point or Wadalba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Voyager Point has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Wadalba scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Voyager Point scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Wadalba scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Voyager Point or Wadalba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wadalba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
